prompt: We need to add a long_description column (TEXT, eventually NOT NULL) to the products table in product-service. The service is deployed with a rolling update strategy — at any point during a deploy, some pods run old code and some run new code. Walk me through the safe way to make this schema change without causing a production outage. Show the migration SQL and the deployment sequence.

assertions.text: First migration adds column as NULL (not NOT NULL immediately)
Explains the rolling deployment risk of adding NOT NULL directly
Mentions a second migration for the NOT NULL constraint as a later step
Migration SQL files use correct Flyway naming (V{n}__ with two underscores)
